title: Inertial scrolling for custom horizontal carousel
design_brief: Custom horizontal pager with momentum decay on release.
mobile_reasoning: Pan + withDecay + snap to nearest after decay.

title: Sheet with skeleton during data fetch
design_brief: Opening a sheet for an item that needs data; show skeleton until loaded.
mobile_reasoning: Sheet renders skeleton variant initially; crossfade when data arrives.

title: FlashList with sticky top action bar (fixed above list)
design_brief: Filter bar above list always visible. Reference: App Store search.
mobile_reasoning: Bar outside list; list takes remaining flex space.

title: Multi-line growing text input with max lines
design_brief: Textarea that grows with content up to 5 lines then scrolls.
mobile_reasoning: onContentSizeChange tracks height; clamp to max.
interaction_details: Grows with content up to max

title: Nested tabs (tab inside tab)
design_brief: Top tabs with bottom tabs both active.
mobile_reasoning: Top tabs via SegmentedControl pattern; bottom tabs via Expo Router.

title: Loading dots that pulse in sequence
design_brief: Three dots loader. Each pulses in sequence.
mobile_reasoning: Per-dot delayed sine.

title: Drawing pad with smoothing
design_brief: Free-form drawing with smooth curves between points.
mobile_reasoning: Use Skia Path with cubicTo to interpolate between sampled points.

title: Volume control during video playback
design_brief: Vertical pan on right edge of video adjusts system volume.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Custom volume not synced with system
mobile_reasoning: expo-av or native volume API; visual overlay shows level.
interaction_details: Pan down on right edge: volume down

title: Heading-based map rotation (drive mode)
design_brief: In drive mode, map rotates so user heading is always up.
mobile_reasoning: Listen to Location.watchHeadingAsync; animate camera heading.

title: Calendar heatmap for daily metrics
design_brief: Calendar view (monthly grid) with cells colored by metric intensity.
mobile_reasoning: Cells in grid colored by value via interpolation.

title: Bauhaus geometric: primary colors, circles, squares, triangles
design_brief: Bauhaus-inspired UI: red/blue/yellow geometric shapes.
mobile_reasoning: Limited palette + Skia for shapes.

title: App pin/unpin (PIP, picture-in-picture)
design_brief: Video can be pinned to PIP on iOS / Android.
mobile_reasoning: react-native-pip or expo-video PIP support.
interaction_details: PIP from system gesture or button

title: Haptic feedback toggle for accessibility users
design_brief: Some users find haptics overwhelming; provide a toggle.
mobile_reasoning: User preference in settings; check before triggering.

title: Lazy import of heavy screens
design_brief: Settings or rarely-used screens loaded via dynamic import.
mobile_reasoning: React.lazy + Suspense.

title: Photo filter sliders (brightness, contrast, saturation)
design_brief: Per-parameter sliders adjust image filters live.
mobile_reasoning: Skia ColorMatrix composed from slider values.

title: Map with offline tile fallback
design_brief: When offline, show cached tiles or static fallback.
mobile_reasoning: NetInfo listener; static image fallback or pre-cached tiles.

title: Heatmap calendar tooltip on tap
design_brief: Tap calendar cell to show tooltip with date + value.
mobile_reasoning: Tap → set selected cell; tooltip rendered with bounds clamp.

title: Page indicator that swells then settles
design_brief: As user swipes between pages, indicator dot temporarily swells.
mobile_reasoning: Scroll position drives dot scale.

title: Bokeh background effect
design_brief: Soft out-of-focus light circles in background.
mobile_reasoning: Few large circles with low opacity + blur.
performance_notes: 6 circles + blur OK on most devices.

title: 3D-touch peek-and-pop on iOS, long-press preview on Android
design_brief: iOS: peek (long-press to preview) and pop (deeper press to commit). Android: long-press shows preview.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: 3D Touch hardcoded (removed in iOS 13+ for most devices)
mobile_reasoning: Long-press universal; force-touch deprecated.

title: Sheet with parallax content as it expands
design_brief: Header inside sheet has parallax effect as sheet expands.
mobile_reasoning: Header translateY interpolated from sheet position.

title: FlashList with sticky footer (totals row)
design_brief: List with sticky bottom row showing totals.
mobile_reasoning: Bottom row outside FlashList; computed via useMemo.

title: Step input (+/- buttons)
design_brief: Quantity selector with +/- buttons. Reference: cart quantity.
mobile_reasoning: +/- Pressables with hit slop ≥44pt + haptic per change.

title: Modal that retains content on minimize (PIP-like)
design_brief: Minimize a modal to corner, restore later. Reference: Apple Music NowPlaying.
mobile_reasoning: Persisted state + animated transition between corner and full.

title: Empty state with illustration animation
design_brief: Empty list shows illustration that subtly animates (floating, breathing).
mobile_reasoning: SVG or Skia with subtle worklet motion.

title: Animated noise texture
design_brief: Subtle noise overlay that animates over time.
mobile_reasoning: Skia Turbulence shader with time-varying seed.

title: Image rotate + flip controls
design_brief: Photo editing: rotate 90° and flip horizontal/vertical.
mobile_reasoning: Transform applied via Skia or RN transform.

title: Reachability time circle (e.g., '15 min walk')
design_brief: Circle showing reachable area within N minutes by walk/transit.
mobile_reasoning: Map Circle with radius derived from walking speed.

title: Diff chart (before vs after)
design_brief: Two area charts overlaid showing change.
mobile_reasoning: Two Skia paths; difference highlighted via fill.

title: Sketch / wireframe mode for app
design_brief: Toggle that puts the app in sketch mode for design feedback.
mobile_reasoning: Theme provider with 'sketch' variant that swaps all primitives to sketch versions.
